name: bistro
title: Bistro
description: A restaurant and café theme built around one object: the menu. Condensed signage caps over a warm text serif, bottle green and a glass of wine for color, and a printed-card carte with dot leaders and tabular prices — turning chalkboard-dark after hours.

tokens.--font-display: site title, headings, course names — the signage voice
tokens.--font-body: body text and menu descriptions — the printed-menu voice
tokens.--color-accent: links, course names, and focus rings
tokens.--color-paper: the carte and other card surfaces
tokens.--color-leader: the dot leaders between dish and price
tokens.--shadow-carte: the carte's lift off the page
